title: X-Force Twin Heroes Robot Car Transformer Toy Set, 2 Action Figures with Weapons, Ages 3+
features: TRANSFORMING ACTION: Each robot figure transforms into a sleek vehicle, providing 2-in-1 play value with easy conversion between modes
DUAL HEROES PACK: Set includes two robot warriors in contrasting blue and red colour schemes, each with unique weapon accessories
QUALITY CONSTRUCTION: Sturdy plastic construction with detailed design elements, articulated joints, and smooth transformation mechanisms
AGE APPROPRIATE: Specially designed for children aged 3 years and above, with child-safe materials and appropriate size for small hands
COMPLETE SET: Package includes 2 transforming robot figures, detachable weapons, and display-worthy packaging for collectors
description: Product Description Enter the exciting world of robot transformation with the X-Force Twin Heroes set! This dynamic duo features two impressive robot figures that come with their own weapons accessories. The set includes a striking blue robot with orange accents and a bold red robot with black details, both showcasing sleek, modern designs with articulated limbs for dynamic posing. Each figure demonstrates impressive detailing with mechanical elements, distinctive chest plates, and unique head designs. Perfect for imaginative play, these action figures are sized just right for young hands and built to withstand energetic adventures. The set comes packaged in an attractive display box with detailed artwork and is suitable for children aged 3 and up. Whether displayed on a shelf or engaged in epic battles, these robot heroes are sure to provide hours of entertaining play. The included weapons accessories add an extra dimension to creative storytelling and action scenarios. Collect these impressive figures and expand your X-Force collection today! Safety Warning Not suitable for children under 36 months. Choking hazard - small parts
